Interface DefaultVisitor

All Superinterfaces:
Visitor<Term>
All Known Implementing Classes:
BoundVarsVisitor, ClashFreeSubst.VariableCollectVisitor, ConstraintAwareSyntacticalReplaceVisitor, LightweightSyntacticalReplaceVisitor, OpCollector, OpCollectorJavaBlock, SolverListener.ContainsModalityOrQueryVisitor, SortCollector, SVNameCorrespondenceCollector, SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsIrrelevantThingsVisitor, SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsModalityOrQueryVisitor, SyntacticalReplaceVisitor, TacletSchemaVariableCollector, TacletVariableSVCollector, TacletVisitor, TermProgramVariableCollector, TermProgramVariableCollectorKeepUpdatesForBreakpointconditions, UninstantiatedGenericSortCollector
public interface DefaultVisitor extends Visitor<Term>
This abstract Vistor class declares the interface for a common term visitor.
